author: @glu583
text:
今からは、電気代は安くなるだろう。
”自然エネルギー”と言う名の怪しい電気の補助金は打ち切られる方向に進み、日本の高性能な原子力や石炭火力発電が進む。
太陽光発電では、ペロブスカイトによるものが、今後は多く用いられるだろうが、現状では効率も悪く、すぐに使われることは無いだろう。
C国制のパネルや充電器その他の補器は、（日本製と比べると）品質も悪く安全性が著しく劣る。
太陽光発電一式の費用と設置費用、10から20年後に必要となる取り外しの費用と廃棄費用を考えるなら、
毎月３～5万円の利益が出てトントンだろうと思う。

author: @mdmsr2000
text: Wow, I've been wanting to find your channel again. I do subscribe. A while back, you did something about the Newman motor. I'm from New Orleans and this was the hot bed for the Newman Motor nearly 50 years ago. I know a guy that knew Joe Newman. He built one of the machines. I told him my theory of why it works and he told me that a NASA engeneer had the same idea. The NASA guy died. I guess it's my turn. That said, I'm broke and can't pursue it right now. If you would like to hear my theory, let me know.

author: @iExistOne
text:
Vortex Math - A mathematical way to explain magnetism and current movement,  where magnetism is represented by 3-6-9 and the other numbers represent direction in which current moves, the doubling pattern, or the halving pattern. 
What is curious, or odd, the current flow, based on the 2D perspective, is not possible, the alternating current will cancel out leaving a net of zero. So, Marco Rodin postulated adding a 3rd dimension to the 2D perspective, to become a generator. That's how the Rodin Coil was born.
Amazing stuff.
PS; A Hexagram doubled is 12.

author: @bearnaff9387
text:
One very important numeric base system to know is the venerable Base-13.  Being a prime number base, it has all sorts of important properties and it was used by the species that constructed the Earth to determine the Ultimate Question to which the supercomputer Deep Thought produced the answer of "42" when asked about "life, the universe, and everything."  Researchers determined that the actual process for which Earth was created was near enough to completion that the question can be extracted.

"What do you get if you multiply six by nine?"  is, in Base-13, indeed "42".

replies.author: @Loosh-o7v
replies.text: Copper wire is the standard that has always been used since we began making transformers with them.  Standard non conductive laminate copper wire (for safety and efficiency) for the winding.  If you introduce a core or magnets , thays where you can start partying with the type  of material. EXAMPLE: hammond makes their transformers core from laminated iron ore sometimes and other times they use steel. It really comes down to application. The reason copper makes up the winding has to do with its conductive properties (aka how fast can the electrons move through it with the least resistance. Apologies if you knew all of this , and I am flogging a dead whores. Hopefully someone can gain a better understanding

author: @Soylent_gruen
text: Sorry, but your explanation as to what remainder you get when dividing 1 through to 9 by nine is not "1". If the divident is smaller than the divisor, the modulus will be equal the divident, not equal to 1. e.g. 1 mod 9 = 1, 2 mod 9 = 2, 3 mod 9 = 3 ... 9 mod 9 = 0

author: @StevenCookFX
text: FYI Rodin did not come up with the math. Tesla and others did. Rodin used other people's work to promote it. I knew Rodin personally and he refused to explain his explanations. The coils that others have made using his ideas were all wrong. I have figured out how to construct the coil and it can handle large voltages without fail. I also know how to calibrate it and it follows the design he talks about. I later found out that he didn't come up with the 3-6-9, 2-5-8, 1-5-7 pattern. Nicola Tesla figured this stuff out way before. Its just not to many payed attention to his work as most thought he was a quack. The Rodin coil is not supposed to be flat. Its a toroid and utilizes nature's principal of energy transfer. You need 3 things for it. 1. Positive 2. Negative 3. Neutral center. There is another man who promoted this in his flying ufo type disc he created and it used harmonic frequencies with a unique type of design. (not free energy either) I have yet to try to construct a proper coil based on Rodin's work. Rodin didn't steal it all there is some he worked on that is valid. If your curious then do a google search for Tesla's 3-6-9 vortex math. Its the same numbers in Rodin's work.

replies.author: @Loosh-o7v
replies.text: I am fairly certain that Marco has stated onn more than one occasion that his "discovery" was expounding onTeslas principles. Now I can admit I may be wrong, unlike 95% of YT comments. But I am interested in how you came to the conclusion that the starseed coil variety, as well as the widely agreed upon, donut-shaped variety of Rodin coil are both inferior to this mystery formation coil that you have made? What tests have you implemented? As well as other questions that I'm not science-y enough to know to ask.

author: @marcgagnon4171
text:
10 years ago i was really interested in Vortex Based Mathematics and i ended up building a 3d coil based on that with one of those kids donut shape toy. I also putted a ball magnet inside just to see what happens. By applying a frequency, i could make the magnet turn inside the donut. I was freakin' amazed(pretty much like Robert when something works lol). I then had the idea of creating a 3d printed version of the VBM torus wich i could wind with wires and put a ball magnet in. After a couple years( yeah i'm slow) i did so but the winding was a pain . I only tested it once and it did nothing but i couldnt make all the test i wished i did.

replies.author: @DFPercush
replies.text: Not enough information. What's the radius of your wheels? The gear ratio between final drive and pedals? And what's the load? You can spin something at 100 mph but if it's in outer space with no resistance then it's making 0 power. Power = torque * angular speed in radians/sec. Using units of Nm for the torque will make it nice and give you power in Watts. Multiply by the efficiency of your generator and that's your max available electric power. From there it's a game of impedance matching to achieve maximum transfer of that power to the load.

author: @pedrojorge4684
text:
This coil gives the impression that because it crosses many times over itself it ends up creating conflicting magnetic fields that reduce energy collection. I think you could test if this is happening by removing some magnets from the base and turning, if the energy production is equal or higher even if you have removed some magnets then probably there are conflicts of magnetic fields.

From my point of view it seems to me that no wire should cross or follow in a different direction, the best energy collection is always in all the wires being as aligned to the same axis as possible. Because by passing energy through them their field will eventually affect what's around it, and you don't want one wire creating an opposite field on top of the other wire.

replies.author: @leomcfadden1978
replies.text: @pedrojorge4684 Opposing fields would give a scalar wave...

replies.author: @pedrojorge4684
replies.text: @leomcfadden1978 I refer to interference from a field that currently runs within the wire. For example, if you transmit "wireless energy" with your wireless cell phone charger, this does not decrease your electricity bill, because the interference from one field to another generates the same opposite action, that is, your light clock will measure that there was energy coming out of it. Maybe it gets a little confusing because I communicate with a translator, he must be translating some expressions incorrectly. My point is that wires not aligned in parallel will have a different effect than those in parallel aligned, because there will be some change in the field, whether for better or for worse, I suppose for the worse.

replies.author: @StevenCookFX
replies.text: Rodin's coils are not flat btw. They are supposed to be wound in a donut shape and I have wound one that could handle over 1k voltage. I had one of Rodin's friends ask me about how I could do it and load it with a higher voltage than he could. During construction the coil will sorta wind itself. You start with the winding pattern then it will always land on the correct spot as you go around. According to Rodin its 2 pairs and what is missing with most is the 3rd winding which is the 3-6-9. The coil if wound properly and calibrated will exhibit strange effects. I have not made one that had any strange effects but HP did a study of them. I have some documentation I made regarding calibration. I have not published anything as I am not an engineer and wanted to verify everything first.

author: @davidsoulsby1102
text:
What I have read about these suggests to me the same people make claims that rank with a flat earth.
Its overly complicated maths is not really any different in a practical sense, maybe its part of the whole deal to mystify.... We already know what is most efficient, the wire cutting the field the closest and longest/greatest surface area the shape of the magnet will allow. Theoretically that would be lots of single insulated wires side by side and stacked in layers, running the full length of the magnet. That gives you the maximum energy transference. not very useful as you would have to jumper each wire top to tail in series. but even this method would work "better" for input/output than Rodin and still be inefficient.

author: @Berkana
text: My skepticism with the Rodin coil videos I've seen is that it seems to be a bunch of mystic mumbo jumbo by people fascinated by a pattern that shows up without having an actual understanding of patterns in numbers and what they mean or what they don't mean. They take these patterns to mean some extremely profound thing, and then infer that therefore a coil prepared in this mystic arrangement must have amazing properties. But that's not how it works. None of the theory behind the Rodin coil is electromagnetic theory, as far as I have seen. At most it is fringe number theory.

Completely off-grid with no solar, wind turbine, or batteries required. The Rodin Coil Over Unity Energy Amplifier turns milliamps into kilowatts. It is cheap to manufacture and costs only pennies when mass produced. It uses entirely off-the-shelf components, requires no special tooling and uses no exotic or proprietary materials

author: @kreynolds1123
text:
In short. Roden math  and roden coils  and starship coils are not very helpful for power generation . It is  unnessesary complex and  requires excess length of copper.  It's like motor  copper coil overhang on steroids.  

Long winded version  with constructive input:
Rodin Vortex math is only slightly interesting in base 10. The commonly reference roden Math is math based in base 10 but only uses 1-9.  Roden vortex math is not a base 9 system.  Besides  roden vortex math generating a useless patern, the uselesd patterns changes in different base math systems which tells  us roden math paterns are not universally special or meaningful, that they are just  artifacts of the base numbering system in use. 

If flattened, a roden coil becomes a starship coil. if you send a current through it , it makes an unnessesaeily complex patern of  magnetic fields  with north and south poles fighting  each other.  The only useful part of the coil are the outside bends, and the outside conductor crossing. if you trace the current  through them, you'll see  the magnetic field and direction of current  effectivly resembles the faulhaber coil, except the faulhaber coil uses much less copper to achieve the same useful magnetic field.. the complex magnetic parts and length of coil inside is useless. Overhang on steroids.   The roden coil and starship coil inside is a wasted mess of crossing copper adding  nothing but resistance and copper cost. 


If you throw out the roden math and roden and starship coils,  but still wind diagonal coil on a torus 
for the even number of magnets,  then one is back  to serpentine and faulhabor coil on torus that's  either a flat plate,  or one with an laminated iron core having either a rectangular or circular cross section. It is  related to the torodial dynamo, except the generator has more than 2 poles and whose coils are wound more related to a serpentine type and faulhaber coils. 

I've seen iron torodial cores made from steel  bailing wire,  and others from steel strapping.

replies.author: @dylanboekelman1471
replies.text:
3 6 and 9 are the only numbers which produce themselves when using recursive unary addition. Numbers 1 2 4 7 8 and 5 will never recurse to 3, 6 or 9. Numbers 3 and 6 will recurse to themselves depending on where you started in base10 (eg the number 33 resolves to a 6, which doubles to 12 which resolved to 3, which doubles to 6, therefore the number 33 resolves to  6 in this math). For geometrical positioning of coils and rotors, these infinitesimals are extremely important. 

Most producers of the Rodin coil seem to take on an electrical view to the coil construction when in fact what we are doing with the Rodin mathematics is mapping the flux density of a single point so that we may maximise the harvest at the point of alignment

author: @ryanjamesloyd6733
text: Super cool thing about base 60 (or rather 12)-  also comes from fingers.  It's how the Ancient Sumerians counted-  you have 12 spaces between the joints of your fingers (using your thumb to keep track), and you've got 5 fingers on the other hand- 60, or 12 finger joints-144.  So you can count to 144 on your fingers, easily.   just blew my mind.  Wish somebody had told me that when I was a kid.
